itemfinder.config.generic.comment.search: Radius in blocks to show cached containers
How often to refresh distances (in ticks)
itemfinder.config.generic.comment.highli: Highlight matching item slots when a container is open
itemfinder.config.generic.comment.hudX: Horizontal position of the HUD panel in pixels
itemfinder.config.generic.comment.hudY: Vertical position of the HUD panel in pixels
itemfinder.config.hotkeys.comment.openLi: Opens the file browser to select a list
itemfinder.config.hotkeys.comment.openIt: Opens the item manager for the active list
itemfinder.config.hotkeys.comment.nextIt: Advances to the next enabled item in the active list
itemfinder.config.hotkeys.comment.prevIt: Goes back to the previous enabled item in the active list
itemfinder.config.hotkeys.comment.openIt: Opens a quick-search popup to find any item in cached containers
itemfinder.config.hotkeys.comment.openCo: Opens the Item Finder settings screen
itemfinder.config.hotkeys.comment.moveHu: Enter drag mode to reposition the HUD panel
